_description: Minimal tiled dashboard with two worksheets side by side

notes.zone_id_uniqueness: Zone IDs must be unique across all dashboards in the workbook. Find max existing ID first.
notes.visual_zone_name: The 'name' attribute on a visual zone must exactly match an existing worksheet name (case-sensitive).
notes.fixed_sizing_requires_equal_min_max: For sizing-mode='fixed', minwidth MUST equal maxwidth and minheight MUST equal maxheight. Otherwise Tableau fires a CheckSizeValidity LogicAssert (DashboardSizePresModelBuilder.cpp:180) and rejects the workbook load. Use sizing-mode='automatic' to allow ranges.
notes.dashboard_window_viewpoints: The <window class='dashboard'> element MUST contain a <viewpoints> child holding one bare <viewpoint name='SheetName' /> per included worksheet. Nesting full <window> elements inside <viewpoints> causes HasVisualDoc to fail in DashboardController_VisualControllers.cpp and the workbook load is rejected.
